settings.name: Set mortality-specific filter?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter mortality alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for mortality alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter mortality alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if mortality filter is activated.

settings.name: Set cluster-specific filter?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter cluster alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for cluster alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter cluster alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if cluster filter is activated.

settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter net-squared displacement alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if nsd filter is activated.

settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter GPS accuracy alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for GPS accuracy alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter GPS accuracy alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if GPS accuracy filter is activated.

settings.name: Set GPS transmission-specific filter?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter GPS transmission alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for GPS transmission alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter GPS transmission alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if GPS transmission filter is activated.

settings.name: Set GPS resurrection-specific filter?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter GPS resurrection alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for GPS resurrection alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter GPS resurrection alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if GPS resurrection filter is activated.

settings.name: Set filter for specific id(s)?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter out all alerts for a specific track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for individual-specific alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter all alerts for a specific individual. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if individual-specific filter is activated.

settings.name: Set filter for custom variables?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter out all alerts for a specific track id(s) that meet the criteria for custom alias(es) and value(s).

settings.name: Custom filter field name(s)
settings.description: Enter field name(s) to use to filter out all alerts for a specific track id(s) in the dataset. Note that multiple fields may be provided, but they must be comma-separated. Input is only used if custom filter is activated.

settings.name: Custom filter value(s)
settings.description: Enter character string value of custom alias field to use to filter out all alerts for a specific track id(s) in the dataset. Note that multiple values may be provided, but they must be comma-separated. Input is only used if custom filter is activated.
